name: part_001
file: tmp_【#兎田ぺこら6周年記念LIVE】周年3D LIVE！ぺこらRUSH！！！！！！！ぺこ！【ホロライブ⧸兎田ぺこら】 [E2D_YFRHFG8]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_001.webm

scenes.description: Usada Pekora performs the song 'Soko ni Aru Kamoshirenai' on a 3D stage with dynamic lighting and effects.
scenes.song_name: そこにあるかもしれない

scenes.description: MC section where Pekora welcomes the audience to her 6th anniversary live and explains the Pachislot theme.
A transition sequence styled after a Pachislot machine jackpot animation featuring Pekora's 'Strike of Destiny'.

subtitles.original: 君に...
subtitles.english: To you...

subtitles.original: 会いたいと言いたくて
subtitles.english: I wanted to say I want to see you

subtitles.original: 二人...
subtitles.english: The two of us...

subtitles.original: 輝いた季節は
subtitles.english: In that season we shined

subtitles.original: 後悔したくないから
subtitles.english: Because I don't want to have any regrets

subtitles.original: 叶わない 夢なんて
subtitles.english: Dreams that don't come true

subtitles.original: 簡単に 口にはしたくない
subtitles.english: Are things I don't want to speak of easily

subtitles.original: 諦めた 瞬間に
subtitles.english: The very moment you give up

subtitles.original: 自分自身 終わらせてるだけ
subtitles.english: You're just bringing an end to yourself

subtitles.original: もっと 単純に感じたい
subtitles.english: I want to feel things more simply

subtitles.original: 君のこと いつも
subtitles.english: About you, I'll always

subtitles.original: 素直に 笑うよ
subtitles.english: Smile with all my heart

subtitles.original: 未来は 続いてく
subtitles.english: The future goes on and on

subtitles.original: 君が ホントにスキだって
subtitles.english: That I really, truly love you

subtitles.original: いつも 心に飾ってたい
subtitles.english: Is what I want to keep in my heart forever

subtitles.original: 楽しさだけが 全てなら
subtitles.english: If it was only about the fun

subtitles.original: 本当の 愛じゃないから
subtitles.english: Then it wouldn't be real love

subtitles.original: 君に...
subtitles.english: To you...

subtitles.original: 会いたいと言いたくて
subtitles.english: I wanted to say I want to see you

subtitles.original: 二人 輝いた季節は
subtitles.english: That season where we both shined

subtitles.original: きっと これからも続いてく
subtitles.english: Will surely continue from here on out

subtitles.original: だから 大切な未来に
subtitles.english: So, for our precious future

subtitles.original: この想いを 残したい
subtitles.english: I want to leave these feelings behind

subtitles.original: 君に...
subtitles.english: To you...

subtitles.original: 会いたいと言いたくて
subtitles.english: I wanted to say I want to see you

subtitles.original: 二人...
subtitles.english: The two of us...

subtitles.original: 輝いた季節は
subtitles.english: In that season we shined

subtitles.original: みんな 6周年ライブに来てくれてアリぺこ！
subtitles.english: Everyone, thank you-peko for coming to my 6th anniversary live!

subtitles.original: そして大変お待たせしました！
subtitles.english: And I'm so sorry to have kept you waiting!

subtitles.original: すんません、すんません。
subtitles.english: My apologies, my apologies.

subtitles.original: けどね、みんなに楽しんでもらえるような
subtitles.english: But you know, I've made this a live show

subtitles.original: ライブになってるぺこだから是非ともお楽しみに！
subtitles.english: that everyone can enjoy, so please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: そして1曲目は「そこにあるかもしれない」を歌わせてもらったぺこ！
subtitles.english: And for the first song, I sang 'Soko ni Aru Kamoshirenai'!

subtitles.original: ま、っていうことは今回のテーマは... そう！パチスロ第2弾！イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Well, which means this time's theme is... That's right! Pachislot Part 2! Yay!

subtitles.original: 当たり演出もね、めちゃめちゃ色々ありますんで、
subtitles.english: There are tons of jackpot effects too,

subtitles.original: 是非とも次の曲は何来るかな？って考えながら
subtitles.english: so I'd be happy if you enjoy guessing what song will come next

subtitles.original: 楽しんでもらえたら嬉しいぺこ！
subtitles.english: while you watch!

subtitles.original: そして今回のハッシュタグはこちら！
subtitles.english: And here's the hashtag for this time!

subtitles.original: 「#兎田ぺこら6周年記念LIVE」ぺこなので、
subtitles.english: It's '#UsadaPekora6thAnniversaryLIVE',

subtitles.original: たくさんポストしてください！
subtitles.english: so please post a lot!

subtitles.original: ちゅうわけで、そんじゃ早速回していくか！
subtitles.english: So with that, let's start spinning right away!

subtitles.original: よいしょっと。あれ？
subtitles.english: Heave-ho. Huh?

subtitles.original: お、始まった！
subtitles.english: Oh, it's started!

subtitles.original: 運命の一撃
subtitles.english: A Strike of Destiny

subtitles.original: 笑うべきだとわかった時は泣くべきじゃねえぺこ！
subtitles.english: When you know you should be laughing, you shouldn't be crying-peko!

subtitles.original: 運命の一撃を
subtitles.english: The Strike of Destiny...

subtitles.original: 叩き込め！
subtitles.english: Smash it in!
